svg.text: groundcheck — every quote and claim, checked against the context

g.text: $ groundcheck check examples/answer.md --context examples/sources
examples/answer.md — 5 spans checked against 2 sources (design, pricing)
SUPPORTED quote L1 "Reads are served from a write-through cache in front of the primary sto…"
SUPPORTED claim L4 Cache entries expire after 300 seconds and a background sweeper enforce…
MISCITED quote L7 "Invoices are generated on the first business day of each month"
cited [1] but the verbatim match is in pricing
evidence [pricing]: Invoices are generated on the first business day of each month
PARTIAL claim L10 The cache absorbed 97% of read traffic during the 2025 load test.
words align with design (score 0.76) but the figure(s) 97% appear nowhere near the evidence
evidence [design]: 2025 load test the cache absorbed 92% of read traffic at the p99 latency target of 12 ms
UNSUPPORTED claim L12 Enterprise revenue grew 40% year over year thanks to the new rebate pro…
best window in pricing scores only 0.09; missing: revenue, grew, 40%, year, … (+4)
2 supported, 1 partial, 1 miscited, 1 unsupported — support 40%
exit 1 (fail-on unsupported)
$ groundcheck check --bundle examples/bundle.json && echo grounded
examples/bundle.json — 2 spans checked against 1 source (logs)
SUPPORTED claim L1 Access logs are retained for 30 days and then deleted by a scheduled jo…
SUPPORTED claim L3 All access logs are encrypted at rest with keys rotated every 90 days.
2 supported, 0 partial, 0 miscited, 0 unsupported — support 100%
grounded
